info.name: Kraken Spot REST API
info.description:
OpenAPI description of Kraken's public Spot REST API. Covers public market data (server time, system status, asset info, ticker, OHLC, order book, recent trades, recent spreads) and the private surface (account data, trading, funding, subaccounts, Earn, WebSocket token). Generated by the API Evangelist pipeline from docs.kraken.com/api/docs/rest-api/.

Contact Support:
 Name: Kraken API Support

request.description: Returns the server's current Unix and human-readable time. Use to synchronize client clocks.
Returns the current system status (online, maintenance, cancel_only, post_only) and the last status change timestamp.

query.description: Comma-delimited list of assets to filter (e.g. XBT,ETH)

request.description: Returns information about supported assets including precision, display decimals, collateral value, and status.

query.description: Comma-delimited list of assets to filter (e.g. XBT,ETH)
Comma-delimited list of asset pairs (e.g. XBTUSD,ETHUSD)
Info detail level (info, leverage, fees, margin)

request.description: Returns metadata for every tradable currency pair (base, quote, fee schedule, lot decimals, ordermin).

query.description: Comma-delimited list of asset pairs (e.g. XBTUSD,ETHUSD)
Info detail level (info, leverage, fees, margin)

request.description: Returns ticker data (ask, bid, last trade, 24h volume, vwap, high, low, opening price) for one or more pairs.

query.description: Return OHLC entries since this timestamp

request.description: Returns OHLC (open/high/low/close/volume/count) candles for a pair at a chosen interval, optionally bounded by a since cursor.

query.description: Return OHLC entries since this timestamp

request.description: Returns the order book (bids and asks) for a pair to a requested depth.
Returns recent trades for a pair, optionally since a cursor.
Returns recent bid/ask spread snapshots for a pair, optionally since a cursor.
